title: Xcode project setup — iOS + watchOS targets, Core Data model
desc: Create Xcode workspace with iOS app target (iOS 17+), watchOS companion app target (watchOS 10+), shared framework for models. Set up folder structure per BRD architecture.

title: Design system — MeetMind purple theme, typography, components
desc: Colors (#6C5CE7 primary purple, #00CE9E success green, #FF4757 recording red, #FFA502 gold), SF Pro + Inter fonts, spacing scale, card/button/badge components. Dark mode from day 1.

title: Groq API key onboarding — settings screen + Keychain storage
desc: Settings screen for API key entry, validate key with test API call, store in iOS Keychain (kSecAttrService=com.meetmind.groq), never log or expose key. Graceful re-entry if lookup fails.

title: Core Data schema — Meeting, Transcript, Brief, Todo, Client
desc: All entities from BRD Appendix C: Meeting (id, date, duration, audioPath, clientId), Transcript (raw text, timestamps), Brief (title, summary, decisions, actions, key topics), Todo (title, dueDate, priority, clientTag, source), Client (name, color, meetingCount).

title: Navigation architecture — TabView + NavigationStack
desc: 4 tabs: Meetings (home + recording), Todos, Library (by client), Settings. NavigationStack with programmatic routing. Deep link support for widget actions.

title: App icon, launch screen, onboarding 3-screen tour
desc: MeetMind branded app icon (purple gradient brain/mic), launch screen with logo, 3-screen onboarding: 1) Record meetings effortlessly 2) AI structures your notes 3) Voice todos with smart dates.

title: Error handling framework — network, API, graceful degradation
desc: Centralized error handling: network connectivity check, Groq API error parsing (rate limit, auth, server), user-facing error toasts, retry logic with exponential backoff.

title: Analytics instrumentation — key user events
desc: Track: record_start, record_stop, transcribe_complete, brief_copied, brief_shared, todo_created, todo_completed. PostHog or local analytics for MVP.

title: AVFoundation recording engine — M4A, 44.1kHz, mono
desc: AVAudioRecorder with M4A (AAC), 44.1kHz sample rate, mono channel, high quality. Save to app Documents directory. Request microphone permission with clear explanation.

title: Background recording — continue when app minimized
desc: Enable BackgroundMode: audio in Info.plist. Recording continues when user switches to Zoom/Meet/Teams. Handle app lifecycle events (background, foreground, terminate).

title: Audio interruption handling — pause/resume gracefully
desc: Handle AVAudioSession interruptions: incoming call → pause, Siri → pause, other app audio → duck/pause. Resume recording automatically when interruption ends.

title: Recording UI — waveform, timer, pause/stop buttons
desc: Full recording screen: live waveform visualization from audio metering, elapsed time counter (HH:MM:SS), prominent Stop button, optional Pause button. Dark theme during recording.

title: Audio compression — stay under Groq 25MB limit
desc: After recording stops, check file size. If >24MB, compress using AVAssetExportSession with lower bitrate while maintaining audio quality sufficient for Whisper transcription.

title: 3-hour max recording limit with warning
desc: Enforce 3-hour maximum per session. Show warning notification at 2h45m. Auto-stop at 3h with save. Display remaining time indicator after 2h.

title: Recording system notification — timer when backgrounded
desc: When app enters background during recording, show persistent notification with recording indicator, elapsed time, and Stop action button.

title: In-meeting text notes overlay (Granola-style)
desc: During recording, show a text field overlay where user can jot quick notes. These notes are passed to the AI along with transcript for enhanced brief generation. User words first, AI enhances.

title: Microphone permission flow with explanation
desc: Custom permission primer screen explaining why mic access is needed before iOS system dialog. If denied, show settings redirect with instructions.

title: Groq Whisper integration — upload + transcribe
desc: POST /openai/v1/audio/transcriptions with model=whisper-large-v3-turbo, response_format=verbose_json. Parse transcript text + word-level timestamps. Store raw transcript in Core Data.

title: Groq Llama 3.3 70B — structured meeting brief
desc: POST /openai/v1/chat/completions with llama-3.3-70b-versatile. Custom system prompt for meeting analyst. JSON schema output: title, summary, decisions, action_items, key_topics, client_name.

title: AI prompt engineering — meeting analyst system prompt
desc: Craft the system prompt per BRD spec: detect client name, use professional language, flag commitments, mark [unclear] sections. Temperature 0.2, max 1500 tokens. Store in app bundle, user-editable.

title: Client/company name detection + auto-folder routing
desc: LLM extracts client_name from transcript context. If detected, auto-file meeting under that client folder. If not detected, file under 'General'. User can correct via long-press.

title: Action item extraction from meeting transcripts
desc: LLM detects commitments: 'I will...', 'We will...', 'By next week...', 'Action item:'. Extract as structured items with owner + due date. Flag as is_mine when user is the committer.

title: Transcription queue — background processing + offline queue
desc: Queue meetings for processing using BGTaskScheduler. Retry on failure with exponential backoff. If offline, queue audio files and process when connectivity returns. Show progress indicator.

title: [unclear] section marking in transcripts
desc: Instruct Whisper/LLM to mark inaudible or unclear sections with [unclear] tag rather than hallucinating content. Display these visually in transcript view.

title: Voice todo — Whisper transcription + Llama date/task parsing
desc: Record short voice note (max 2 min), Whisper transcribes, Llama extracts: task description, assignee (self default), target date. Example: 'remind me to send report by Thursday' → task with due date.

title: AI prompt customization — user-editable in settings
desc: Allow user to view and edit the meeting analyst system prompt from Settings. Provide 3 preset styles: Concise, Detailed, Executive. Reset to default option.

title: Post-processing pipeline orchestration
desc: End-to-end flow: record stop → compress if needed → upload to Whisper → parse transcript → send to Llama → parse JSON → save brief + transcript → extract action items → create todos → detect client → file meeting.

title: Meeting list view — cards with metadata
desc: Scrollable list of meeting cards showing: AI-generated title, client badge (color-coded), date/time, duration, action item count. Quick action buttons: Copy Brief, View Full, Share.

title: Meeting detail view — brief + expandable transcript
desc: Full meeting view: formatted brief (summary, decisions, action items, key topics), expandable raw transcript section, copy/share buttons at top. Progressive disclosure — brief first, transcript on expand.

title: Client folder system — auto-create + color-coded badges
desc: Automatically create client folders from LLM-detected names. Each client gets a unique color badge. Folder shows meeting count, last meeting date. Tap to see all meetings for that client.

title: By-client library view — folder grid
desc: Grid view showing client folders with initials/logo, meeting count, last meeting date. 'General' folder for untagged meetings. Search across all clients.

title: Manual client correction — long-press to reassign
desc: Long-press on meeting card → show client picker → select correct client → meeting re-files to new folder immediately. Update client dictionary for future detection improvement.

title: Client dictionary — user-editable for improved detection
desc: Settings screen showing all detected clients. User can add, rename, merge, or delete clients. Dictionary used to improve LLM detection accuracy in future meetings.

title: Copy brief to clipboard — one tap, formatted
desc: Primary action on every meeting: copy formatted brief to clipboard. Format per BRD: Meeting Brief header, date/client/duration, summary, decisions, action items, key topics. Ready for email paste.

title: Share sheet — iOS native share for briefs
desc: Open iOS share sheet with formatted brief text. Supports: Mail, Messages, WhatsApp, Slack, Notes, Files. Also option to export as .txt file.

title: Meeting search — full-text across briefs and transcripts
desc: Search bar in Library tab. Full-text search across meeting titles, brief content, and raw transcripts. Results highlighted with matching text preview.

title: Voice todo capture — mic button + AI parsing
desc: Prominent mic button on Todo tab. Record voice (max 2 min), Whisper transcribes, Llama parses task + date + priority. User reviews and confirms before saving.

title: Text todo entry — input field + date picker + priority
desc: Text input for typing todos directly. Date picker defaults to today, can select any future date. Priority picker: Low/Medium/High. Optional client tag dropdown.

title: Today view — tasks due today, sorted by priority
desc: Primary todo view showing today's tasks. Sorted: High → Medium → Low. Each task shows title, client tag, due time if set. Swipe actions for complete/reschedule.

title: Upcoming view — next 7 days grouped by day
desc: Weekly view with calendar strip at top. Tasks grouped by day. Shows total per day. Empty days show 'Nothing planned' state.

title: All tasks view — full list with filters
desc: Complete task list with filters: by client tag, by date range, by priority, by source (manual vs from meeting). Sort options: date, priority, client.

title: Swipe left to complete — green checkmark animation
desc: Swipe left gesture reveals green checkmark. On release: task slides out, checkmark animation plays, haptic success feedback. Task moves to Done section.

title: Swipe right to reschedule — inline date picker
desc: Swipe right reveals reschedule action. Shows inline date picker to select new date. Task updates and re-sorts in the list.

title: Done section — completed tasks collapsed at bottom
desc: Completed tasks move to collapsible 'Done' section at bottom of each view. Shows completion count. Expand to see completed tasks with timestamps.

title: Client tag on todos — link to client folders
desc: Optional client tag on each todo. Tap to select from detected clients. Links todo to client folder context. Filter todos by client in All Tasks view.

title: Auto-create todos from meeting action items
desc: When meeting processing completes, action items where is_mine=true automatically create todos with 'from meeting' tag, linked to the meeting, with extracted due date.

title: watchOS app — Record/Stop UI + waveform + timer
desc: Native watchOS app with simple Record/Stop interface. Show: recording waveform animation, elapsed time, battery level. Use WKAudioRecorderPreset for mic access.

title: WatchConnectivity — transfer audio to iPhone
desc: After Watch recording stops, transfer audio file to iPhone via WatchConnectivity framework. iPhone receives and auto-queues for transcription. Show transfer progress on Watch.

title: Watch battery warning during recording
desc: Monitor Watch battery during recording. Show warning alert when <10%. Suggest stopping and continuing on iPhone. Don't auto-stop — user decides.

title: Watch todo complication — pending task count
desc: ClockKit complication showing today's pending todo count. Tap opens MeetMind Watch app todo list. Updates via WatchConnectivity data transfer.

title: Watch todo list — scrollable + mark complete
desc: Scrollable list of today's todos on Apple Watch. Tap to mark complete with haptic confirmation. Syncs completion status back to iPhone via WatchConnectivity.

title: Double-tap gesture recording start (Genspark-inspired)
desc: Support Apple Watch double-tap gesture to instantly start recording. No need to open app — just tap wrist. Requires watchOS 10+ Ultra/Series 9+.

title: Lock Screen widget — mic icon + tap to record
desc: Compact Lock Screen widget showing MeetMind mic icon and 'Record' label. Tapping opens app and auto-starts recording via deep link. WidgetKit + App Intents.

title: Home Screen small widget — meeting count + Record
desc: Small (2x2) widget showing today's meeting count and a Record button. Tap Record → deep-link to app in recording mode. Refreshes every 15 min.

title: Home Screen medium widget — meetings + Record + Todo
desc: Medium (4x2) widget showing: today's date, meeting count, last meeting title, Record button, Add Todo button. Two deep-link actions.

title: App Intents for widget deep-link actions
desc: Configure App Intents to support: StartRecording (opens app in recording mode), AddTodo (opens app in todo capture mode). Used by WidgetKit and Lock Screen widgets.

title: Widget data refresh — timeline every 15 min
desc: WidgetKit TimelineProvider with 15-minute refresh intervals. Read meeting count + last meeting from shared App Group UserDefaults. Graceful offline rendering with cached data.

title: iCloud sync — Core Data CloudKit across devices
desc: Enable NSPersistentCloudKitContainer for automatic iCloud sync of meetings, todos, clients across iPhone and Apple Watch. Handle merge conflicts gracefully.

title: Offline recording queue — transcribe when connected
desc: If no internet during/after recording, queue audio file locally. Monitor network reachability. When connected, process queue in order. Show queued items with status indicator.

title: Auto-delete old audio files after processing
desc: After successful transcription + brief generation, mark audio for deletion. Configurable retention: delete after 7/14/30 days. Keep briefs and transcripts forever.

title: Local file management — disk space tracking
desc: Settings shows total disk usage by audio files. Warning when >500MB used. One-tap cleanup of processed audio. Never delete unprocessed audio.

title: Data export — meetings + todos as JSON/CSV
desc: Export all meetings (briefs + transcripts) and todos as JSON or CSV file. Share via iOS share sheet. Useful for backup and migration.

title: Accessibility audit — VoiceOver, Dynamic Type, reduce motion
desc: Full accessibility pass: VoiceOver labels on all interactive elements, Dynamic Type support for all text, respect Reduce Motion preference for animations.

title: Edge case testing — large files, network failures, rate limits
desc: Test: 3-hour recording upload, network drop mid-transcription, Groq rate limit (7200s/day), empty transcript, corrupt audio, simultaneous recording + todo capture.

title: App Store screenshots + preview video
desc: 6.7" iPhone screenshots for all key screens (recording, brief, library, todos). Apple Watch screenshots. 30-second preview video showing record → brief → copy flow.

title: Privacy policy, App Store description, ASO keywords
desc: Privacy policy (mic usage, no data sharing, local processing). App Store title/subtitle/description optimized for keywords: meeting notes, AI, recording, transcription, todo.

title: TestFlight beta + physical device testing
desc: Deploy to TestFlight. Test on physical iPhone + Apple Watch. Verify: recording quality, background recording, Watch transfer, widget deep links, iCloud sync.

title: Post-recording: auto-navigate to meeting brief
desc: After pipeline completes, automatically show the meeting detail view with the generated brief instead of staying on processing card.

title: Meeting brief loading state — shimmer placeholders
desc: While brief is generating, show shimmer placeholder blocks for each section (summary, decisions, actions) so user knows content is coming.

title: Meeting brief — section-by-section streaming
desc: Show each brief section as it arrives from the LLM instead of waiting for complete response. Summary first, then decisions, then actions.

title: Recording quality indicator — live audio level bar
desc: Show a small audio quality indicator during recording (green=good, yellow=ok, red=poor). Helps user position microphone correctly.

title: Meeting brief — edit/refine after generation
desc: Allow user to edit the AI-generated brief sections (title, summary, decisions). Inline editing with save button.

title: Meeting brief — regenerate with different prompt style
desc: Button to re-run the AI analysis with a different style (Concise/Detailed/Executive) without re-transcribing.

title: Todo — natural language date parsing in text entry
desc: Type "send report by Friday" and AI auto-detects the due date. No need to manually pick from date picker.

title: Todo — recurring tasks (daily/weekly/monthly)
desc: Support recurring todos: "standup every weekday at 9am", "weekly report every Friday". Auto-create next occurrence on completion.

title: Todo — priority auto-suggestion from context
desc: AI suggests priority based on task content: "urgent" or "ASAP" → High, "when you get a chance" → Low. User can override.

title: Meeting — auto-detect meeting platform (Zoom/Meet/Teams)
desc: Detect if recording happened during a Zoom, Google Meet, or Teams call (via audio session or calendar). Show platform icon on meeting card.

title: Meeting — follow-up reminders for action items
desc: For each action item with a due date, auto-create a local notification reminder 1 day before. "Reminder: Send spot instance config doc — due tomorrow"

title: Meeting — sentiment analysis per discussion topic
desc: AI tags each discussion topic as positive/neutral/negative/heated. Visual indicator on the brief (green/gray/orange/red dots next to topics).

title: Meeting — compare briefs across meetings with same client
desc: When viewing a client folder, show "This week vs last week" comparison: topics that recurred, action items carried over, new decisions.

title: Meeting — key quotes extraction
desc: AI extracts 2-3 important direct quotes from the transcript with speaker attribution. "Mitchell said: That is the biggest compliment I think you can get."

title: Meeting — timeline/chapters view
desc: Break the meeting into chapters (Introduction, Discussion, Action Items, Wrap-up) with timestamps. Tap a chapter to jump to that part of the transcript.

title: Home dashboard — today summary card
desc: Top of Meetings tab shows: X meetings recorded today, Y action items created, Z todos pending. Quick stats at a glance.

title: Home dashboard — next meeting countdown
desc: If calendar is connected, show countdown to next meeting with pre-brief button. "Meijer BTEQ call in 45 min — View pre-brief"

title: Notification — meeting processed notification
desc: When background pipeline completes, send local notification: "Meeting brief ready: [title]. Tap to view." Deep links to meeting detail.

title: Settings — Groq API usage dashboard
desc: Show Groq free tier usage: X seconds of audio transcribed today (limit 7200s), Y chat completions (limit 14400/day). Progress bars with color indicators.

title: Dark mode — full theme support
desc: Complete dark mode with automatic system detection. All screens, cards, badges, overlays properly themed. Recording view already dark.

title: Onboarding — interactive demo with sample meeting
desc: After onboarding, show a demo meeting brief (pre-loaded) so user immediately sees the value. "Here is what MeetMind produces" with a real example.

title: Meeting brief — email-ready formatting
desc: "Email Brief" button generates a clean HTML email body with proper formatting, not just plain text. Ready to paste into Gmail/Outlook compose.

title: Meeting — audio playback of recording
desc: In meeting detail, add a mini audio player to replay the original recording. Seek to timestamp when tapping transcript sections.

title: Granola: Meeting Recipes — saved reusable AI prompts
desc: Create a Recipes system: saved prompt templates users can apply to any meeting. Built-in recipes: 'Coach me' (feedback analysis), 'Prep me' (pre-meeting context), 'Write a brief' (document from brainstorm), 'Summarize objections' (sales). User can create custom recipes. Access via / command in chat.

title: Granola: People view — lightweight CRM per person
desc: Track every person you've met with. Auto-detect participant names from transcripts. People view shows: name, company, total meetings, last meeting date, all meeting notes with that person. Tap person → see full meeting history. Search by person name.

title: Granola: Company view — organize meetings by company
desc: Auto-detect company names from meetings. Company view shows: company name, total meetings, all participants from that company, all meeting notes. Different from client folders — companies are auto-detected from context, not just meeting topics.

title: Granola: AI Chat with meeting context
desc: Chat interface where you can ask questions about your meetings: 'What did they say about pricing?', 'List all action items from last week', 'What objections came up in sales calls?'. AI searches across all meeting transcripts and briefs to answer.

title: Granola: One-click follow-up email generation
desc: After a meeting, tap 'Write follow-up' → AI generates a professional follow-up email based on the meeting brief. Includes: thank you, key decisions recap, action items with owners, next steps. Ready to paste into email.

title: Granola: Meeting templates for different meeting types
desc: Pre-configured templates that change how AI structures the brief: 1:1 template (personal goals, feedback), Sales call (objections, budget, timeline), Interview (candidate assessment), Standup (blockers, progress), Discovery call (pain points, requirements). User selects before or after recording.

title: Granola: Pre-meeting prep — context from past meetings
desc: Before a meeting, show context from previous meetings with same participants/company: last meeting summary, open action items, key decisions, unresolved questions. Notification 5 min before: 'Here is context from your last meeting with [person/company]'.

title: Granola: One-click share to Slack/Email/Notion
desc: After meeting brief is generated, show quick-share buttons: 'Share to Slack' (select channel), 'Email to all participants', 'Copy public link', 'Export to Notion'. Each formats the brief appropriately for the platform.

title: Granola: Custom vocabulary / internal jargon
desc: User can add company-specific terms, acronyms, and names to improve transcription accuracy. Example: 'BTEQ', 'Databricks', 'Meijer', 'Celebal'. Whisper uses these as prompt hints for better recognition. Accessible from Settings.

title: Granola: Calendar integration — auto-detect meetings
desc: Connect Google Calendar. Show upcoming meetings on Home tab. Auto-start recording when meeting time arrives (optional). Link meeting notes to calendar events. Show 'Meeting in 5 min' notification with pre-brief.

title: Granola: Notepad mode — type notes during meeting, AI enhances
desc: Instead of just a text field, provide a full Notion-style notepad during recording. User types bullet points, headers, key words. After meeting, AI enhances these sparse notes with transcript context. User's words are preserved and highlighted, AI fills gaps.

title: Granola: Multi-language transcription support
desc: Support transcription in 10+ languages with automatic language detection. Whisper large-v3 supports this natively. Add language selector in Settings (auto-detect / English / Hindi / Spanish / etc). Important for India market.

title: Granola: Meeting search across all history
desc: Global search across ALL meetings: search by keywords, person name, company, date range, action items. Results show matching snippets with context. 'When did we discuss pricing with Acme?' → finds exact meeting and paragraph.

title: Granola: Action item tracking across meetings
desc: Dedicated Action Items view showing ALL action items from ALL meetings. Filter by: mine vs others, completed vs pending, by person, by company. Track completion status across meetings. 'You have 3 overdue action items from last week'.

title: Granola: Meeting folders — organize notes in collections
desc: Let users create custom folders/collections to organize meetings beyond just client/company. Examples: 'Q3 Planning', 'Hiring', 'Product Roadmap'. Drag meetings into folders. A meeting can be in multiple folders.

title: Granola: Phone call recording on iOS
desc: Record in-person conversations and phone calls through the device microphone (not just computer meetings). Separate 'Record call' mode optimized for phone-quality audio. Useful for client calls, interviews, hallway conversations.

title: Granola: Ask AI anything about your meetings
desc: 'Ask Granola' style feature: type any question and AI searches your entire meeting history to answer. 'What budget did Acme mention?', 'How many times have we discussed the migration?', 'What were the key decisions this month?'. Powered by embedding search + LLM.

title: Granola: Automatic participant detection from audio
desc: Detect and label different speakers in the transcript (speaker diarization). Show 'Speaker 1:', 'Speaker 2:' labels. After first meeting, learn voice profiles and assign names. Critical for professional meeting notes.
